objective: Perform exactly two compact web_search calls about the CURRENT context of surrogacy (Leihmutterschaft) as of 2026-07-22: one query focused on current German law and reform debate, and one focused on European cross-border parentage and ethics. NEVER call web_fetch and never call any file tool. Using only search-result titles, snippets, and direct URLs, return ONLY one JSON object matching research-output.schema.json. The dossier_markdown value must be entirely in German, contain the literal word Deutschland, state the retrieval date, distinguish gestational from traditional surrogacy, cover current German law and debate, cross-border parentage, and ethical arguments on both sides. Clearly label snippet-only claims as uncertain; do not conflate exploitation through surrogacy with surrogacy categorically and do not invent events or legal changes. Include at least six sources found in the searches. Do not draft the dialogue.
